title: eulophia chlorantha
intro: Eulophia chlorantha, also known as the green-flowered grass orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eulophia chlorantha include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and fight off infections. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by boiling the roots and leaves in water, or as a decoction by simmering the roots in water for an extended period.
